name: @forge-builder/base-mcp-server
description: MCP Server for Base — gas prices, block numbers, balances, and bytecode lookups via direct Base RPC calls

tools.name: get_base_gas_price
tools.description: Returns current gas price on Base network in Gwei with estimated costs for different operations

tools.name: get_base_block_number
tools.description: Returns current Base blockchain block number

tools.name: get_base_balance
tools.description: Get ETH balance of any address on Base

tools.name: lookup_erc8004_agent
tools.description: Look up an agent registration by address or name using the ERC-8004 registry
